description: Real Renovate config for renovate-mcp, also kept as a showcase. Edit with this repo's preview_custom_manager (iterate on regex managers) and lint_config (catch Renovate-specific footguns), then dry_run before committing.

packageRules.description: Group all devDependency updates into a single PR to minimise tooling churn.

On every renovate devDependency bump, regenerate src/data/presets.generated.ts so the committed preset snapshot stays in lockstep with the installed Renovate version. Requires the operator's RENOVATE_ALLOWED_POST_UPGRADE_COMMANDS to permit `npm ci` and `npm run generate:presets`.
